message:
feat(core): add format versioning to SkillSpec for future migrations

Add a format_version field to SkillSpec to enable schema migrations
and backward compatibility as the spec format evolves.

Changes to SkillSpec struct:
- Add format_version field with default value "1.0"
- Add FORMAT_VERSION constant for centralized version management
- Add #[serde(default)] to all SkillMetadata fields to allow partial
  YAML frontmatter parsing without requiring all fields

The format_version field allows:
- Detection of older spec formats that need migration
- Graceful handling of specs created by older versions
- Future tooling to upgrade specs to newer formats

Test updates:
- core/layering.rs: Update make_skill_spec helper
- core/slicing.rs: Update test fixtures
- quality/skill.rs: Update minimal_spec helper
- storage/git.rs: Update sample_spec helper
- storage/tx.rs: Update sample_skill helper
- test_utils/arbitrary.rs: Update proptest arbitrary generator
- tests/properties/roundtrip_tests.rs: Update proptest generators
- tests/properties/safety_tests.rs: Update proptest generators

All test fixtures now include format_version to match the updated
SkillSpec structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
